{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032011420535B6B845F6F5DB7C7916"}"},"total":10195},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7364379820064867096","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者啊（嚼嚼嚼）你说审核（嚼嚼嚼）会不会还卡你的书（嚼嚼嚼）会不会进小黑屋啊（嚼嚼嚼）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714654801,"group_id":"7307976828990278718","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3158210299306663"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7307976828990278718","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"360"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33162,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7360692603488617240","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"男女主两人历经几世，最后相爱，从刚开始的男主见到女主报仇的心切，让我眼前一亮，不跟平常的系统文，男主抛弃以前的恩仇大怨，开始攻略，而这本书却不一样，再后面男女的相爱，以及女主知晓男主身份的隔阂到消失隔阂，最后男女主真心相爱，让女主从一个高冷女神，变成一位吃醋可爱的女友，让我看的齁甜，所以呆子加油，不过二人无法进行最后一步，我很期待呆子会怎么去写，我会一直看这本书，直到完结，作者加油，望你的书更加爆红。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713796571,"group_id":"7307976828990278718","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"时间的流逝从来没有自我救赎","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwm8lnXUhALkJH6kdxSS0QYG9A1zvoS4wbNu40K5Q7pB","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b211d3e884b141d0b3b12c390f2bc46d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531095&x-signature=lVpAqjYgtpBnnFHc1yFAON6oeGU%3D","user_id":"3158210299306663","user_name":"白玫瑰͏͏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3158210299306663","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7307976828990278718","book_info":{"abstract":"王枫身穿修仙世界，觉醒系统，本以为能成为仙人之境，登顶修仙界之巅。
不料半路杀出一个绝美女子，系统给的九条命硬生生被杀成了一条。
他们两人仿佛就像天生注定要在一起的一样，无论到哪里都能互相碰见。
而第九世重生的王枫竟然又双叒叒碰到了她！
好消息是：她在那场大战之后道心和帝躯重伤难治，无奈破境重修，没有了修为。
坏消息是：她有记忆和法宝！
系统：现在她没修为，绝好的机会，给我狠狠的攻略她！把她拿下，我直接狠狠的奖励你......
只是......
九世孽缘，九世孽缘，终究还是孽缘.......
但......
——

而第九世重生的王枫竟然又双叒叒碰到了她！
